channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SHARIKA] Sharika Enterprises names Sanjay Verma as CEO amid rising momentum in Grid Digitalization and Energy Transition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sharika Enterprises Limited has appointed Mr. Sanjay Verma as its Chief Executive Officer (CEO), effective April 1, 2026. The leadership transition comes at a time when utilities across India are scaling investments in grid modernization, automation, and digital infrastructure to improve reliability and integrate renewable energy. Mr. Verma brings over three decades of experience spanning power distribution, utility systems, and digital grid technologies. His experience includes working with utilities, regulators, and global technology partners during critical phases of grid modernization. Mr. Verma has contributed to the adoption of distribution automation technologies and intelligent grid solutions, combining technical planning with on-ground execution. His appointment is expected to further deepen Sharika Enterprises' engagement in smart grid deployments and digital infrastructure projects.

  • Sharika Enterprises appoints Mr. Sanjay Verma as CEO
  • Appointment effective from April 1, 2026
  • Mr. Verma has over three decades of experience in power distribution and digital grid technologies
  • Appointment seen as strategic step to strengthen positioning in the evolving smart grid ecosystem
  • Mr. Verma's appointment expected to deepen engagement in smart grid deployments and digital infrastructure projects

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sharika Enterprises Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BANKINDIA] Bank of India Issues Debt Securities Worth INR 10,000 Crores
item.description:
Bank of India, a prominent Indian public sector bank, has announced the issuance of debt securities under Chapter VIII specification. The securities include perpetual and fixed maturity debt instruments with varying coupon rates and maturity dates. The total amount issued is INR 10,000 crores. The details of the securities are as follows: Perpetual debt securities with a coupon rate of 8.57%, maturing on 30/09/2031. Fixed maturity debt securities with a coupon rate of 7.14%, maturing on 15/09/2033. Fixed maturity debt securities with a coupon rate of 7.88%, maturing on 12/12/2035. The bank has not included a call option in these securities. The issuance of these securities is a significant move by the bank, indicating its financial health and investment strategies.

  • Bank of India issues debt securities worth INR 10,000 crores
  • Includes perpetual and fixed maturity debt securities
  • Various coupon rates and maturity dates
  • No call option included in the securities
  • Significant move indicating the bank's financial health

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF INDIA | Category: Investment

item.title: [INDLEASE] India Lease Development Ltd Receives No Disclosure of Encumbered Shares as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
India Lease Development Limited has received and made a disclosure on the Bombay Stock Exchange that none of the promoters have encumbered their shares as of March 31, 2026, in accordance with Regulations 31(1), 31(2), and 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The promoters, Rajiv Gupta, Vinislite of Sone, Cecealieents, Arti Gupta, Raghav Aggarwal, Ved Prakash (HUF), Ahuja Services Private Limited, and Motor & General Finance Limited have not made any encumbrance directly or indirectly as of the aforementioned date.

  • India Lease Development Limited has received no disclosure of encumbered shares as of March 31, 2026.
  • Regulations 31(1), 31(2), and 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 have been followed in the disclosure process.
  • Promoters Rajiv Gupta, Vinislite of Sone, Cecealieents, Arti Gupta, Raghav Aggarwal, Ved Prakash (HUF), Ahuja Services Private Limited, and Motor & General Finance Limited have not made any encumbrance directly or indirectly.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA LEASE DEVELOPMENT LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MERMETL] Mercury Ev-Tech Ltd Promoters Declare No New Encumbrances on Shares for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Mercury Ev-Tech Ltd promoters, Artiben Jayeshbhai Thakkar and Kavit Jayeshbhai Thakkar, have declared that they, along with persons acting in concert, have not made any new encumbrances on their shares in the company for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. This declaration was made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The existing encumbrances, if any, among some promoters are already known and documented.

  • Mercury Ev-Tech Ltd promoters declare no new encumbrances on shares for FY 2025-2026
  • Declaration made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Existing encumbrances, if any, among some promoters are already known and documented
  • The declaration covers the financial year ending March 31, 2026
  • Artiben Jayeshbhai Thakkar and Kavit Jayeshbhai Thakkar are the promoters who made the declaration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MERCURY METALS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [XLENERGY] XL Energy Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q1 2026 Ahead of Financial Results
item.description:
XL Energy Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the quarter ended 31st March 2026. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company’s Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed for Directors, Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and Connected persons covered under the Code from April 01, 2026. The window will open 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

  • XL Energy Ltd closes trading window for the quarter ended 31st March 2026
  • Closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the Company’s Code of Conduct
  • Trading window to remain closed for Directors, Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and Connected persons
  • Window to open 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for Q1 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: XL Energy Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GMDCLTD] Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd Receives ESG Rating of 68/100 from NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Ltd
item.description:
Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Limited has received an Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Rating of 68/100 from NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Ltd. The rating, categorized as ‘Aspiring’, was assigned based on publicly available information without the Company's participation or data provision. The Company did not engage NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Ltd for the evaluation or issuance of its ESG Rating.

  • Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd receives ESG Rating of 68/100 from NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Ltd
  • Rating categorized as ‘Aspiring’
  • Rating assigned based on publicly available information
  • Company did not participate in or provide specific data for the assessment
  • ESG Rating received through an email intimation from BSE Limited on 6th April, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT MINERAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [TATAPOWER] Tata Power Company Ltd Announces Transfer of Securities
item.description:
Tata Power Company Ltd has announced the transfer of securities in physical mode, as per the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/DOS3/CIR/P/2018/139 dated November 6, 2018. The transfer is in favor of the transferees Mr. Aruna M Jain, Mr. Motilal F Nashar, Mr. Arvind Agrawal, Mrs. Shantaben Shah, and Mrs. Sonalben Bhadresh Sheth. The transfer involves 500 equity shares from Mr. Aruna M Jain to Mr. Arvind Agrawal and 800 equity shares from Mrs. Shantaben Shah to Mrs. Sonalben Bhadresh Sheth. The distinctive numbers for the shares transferred from Mr. Aruna M Jain are from 53146171 to 53146670 and from Mrs. Shantaben Shah are from 24429331 to 24430130. This information is also available on the company's website.

  • Tata Power Company Ltd announces transfer of securities
  • Transfer of 500 equity shares from Aruna M Jain to Arvind Agrawal
  • Transfer of 800 equity shares from Shantaben Shah to Sonalben Bhadresh Sheth
  • Distinctive numbers for shares transferred from Aruna M Jain are from 53146171 to 53146670
  • Distinctive numbers for shares transferred from Shantaben Shah are from 24429331 to 24430130

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA POWER CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PSPL] Animesh Kumar Acquires 0.235% Additional Shares in PDP Shipping & Projects Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
Animesh Kumar, a notable figure, has acquired 7,404 equity shares of PDP Shipping & Projects Ltd through the open market. This purchase represents a 0.235% increase in his existing shareholding, which now stands at 69.657%. The total voting rights of the company remain unchanged at 29,74,424 equity shares. This acquisition was made on 30.03.2026, as per the latest filing done by the company to the stock exchange.

  • Animesh Kumar acquires 7,404 shares of PDP Shipping & Projects Ltd through the open market.
  • This acquisition represents a 0.235% increase in his existing shareholding.
  • His total shareholding now stands at 69.657%.
  • The total voting rights of the company remain unchanged at 29,74,424 equity shares.
  • The acquisition was made on 30.03.2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PDP Shipping & Projects Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PONDYOXIDE] Ashish Bansal Acquires 6.91% Shares in Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd via Transmission
item.description:
Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Mr. Ashish Bansal, Promoter and Managing Director of the Company, has acquired 21,07,244 equity shares, which is 6.91% of the total equity share capital of the Company, by way of transmission of shares on 01 April 2026.

  • Ashish Bansal, Promoter and Managing Director of Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd, has acquired 6.91% shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made through transmission of shares on 01 April 2026.
  • The total number of shares acquired is 21,07,244.
  • This acquisition is exempted from making an open offer under Regulation 10(1)(g) read with Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Post-transaction, Ashish Bansal holds 22.11% shares of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PONDY OXIDES & CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NAUKRI] Info Edge (India) Ltd Releases Naukri Jobspeak Index Report for March 2026
item.description:
Info Edge (India) Ltd has released the Naukri Jobspeak Index Report for March 2026. The report is available on the company's website and provides insights into the state of the Indian job market and hiring activities based on new job listings and job-related searches by recruiters on the resume database of Naukri.com. The report captures hiring activity across various dimensions including industries, cities, functional areas, and experience bands.

  • Naukri Jobspeak Index Report for March 2026 released
  • Report provides insights into the Indian job market and hiring activities
  • Insights based on new job listings and job-related searches on Naukri.com
  • Hiring activity captured across multiple dimensions
  • Report available on Info Edge (India) Ltd's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFO EDGE (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
